LAW AND MOTION 301, PLAINTIFF VANESSA LINDSAY'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE DENIAL OF PLAINTIFF VANESSA LINDSAY MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION AGAINST DEFENDANT MARY JEAN DOMINGUEZ IS DENIED; THE ADDITIONAL EVIDENCE WAS PREVIOUSLY AVAILABLE AND SHOULD NOT BE CONSIDERED ON REPLY AND DOES NOT JUSTIFY RECONSIDERATION. IN ANY EVENT, IT DOES NOT DISPEL THE EXISTENCE OF FACTUAL ISSUES PREVENTING SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF ANY CAUSES OF ACTION. MS. DOMINGUEZ IS TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189

DEFENDANT HAS RAISED A TRIABLE ISSUE OF MATERIAL FACT AT LEAST AS TO THE CORRECT AMOUNT OF DAILY DAMAGES IN LIGHT OF HER DECLARATION CONCERNING REDUCED SERVICES AND HABITABILITY ISSUES. THE REQUEST FOR CONTINUANCE IS DENIED. ORDER WAS SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: ANNE MENDOZA CSR # 6812
